title: Power Wheelchair Billing Dispute — Poor Handling
scenario: Customer disputes an invoice. Agent blames the customer's insurance, is defensive, and offers no resolution.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I got a bill I don't think I should have to pay. My Medicare covered my wheelchair.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Medicare only covers eighty percent. The rest is on you or your supplemental.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Well, you should call them and ask why they didn't pay.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We bill whatever we have on file. If your insurance is wrong, that's on you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ma'am, I'm telling you how it works. If you want to dispute it, call your insurance.
